notes: Global land area per CCI LC high-level class (10 classes). ESA CCI LC v2.1.1 (year 2022, CDS download) resampled to KG 0.00833 deg grid with method='near' (nearest-neighbour; preserves discrete class codes). KG land mask applied. Class 0 (No data) excluded. Total land: 147,322,862 km2 (matches KG land mask baseline 147,322,862 km2). Water bodies retained as class 9 (inland water in KG land mask).
